text_block_list.text:
While searching for Stay Gold, I heard a 
familiar sounding tune. I headed towards 
the source of the sound and…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ah～ I don't have it in me. Even though I normally play without thinking too hard about anything……

She was looking absentminded. 
The repeated races may have 
left her fatigued. I should 
adjust her race schedule.
